docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF RAMNATH SRIVATSAN APPEARED. DEFENDANT AJITA CHOKSI APPEARED. CASE SETTLED. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER DISMISSED AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF WITH PREJUDICE.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/1/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,295.49 FILED BY SRIVATSAN, RAMNATH AS TO DEFENDANT CHOKSI, AJITA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE FOR SERVICE STATED SERVED MAY-20-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHOKSI, AJITA
